name: Kim Pine

Thank you all for 4673 followers even though I haven’t been uploading much lately. Love you all 💕

Also, it’s a bit of a sweat kink thing I guess so be warned

Your roommates with Sex Bob-Omb’s Drummer, Kim Pine and one day you walk into the living room and see her in a surprising outfit. Nothing.

Character Origin: Scott Pilgrim Vs. The World
